description_long: This is a small wooden observation or lookout tower elevated on four sturdy legs, with a simple rectangular platform enclosed by waist-high wooden walls. The structure is accessed by a vertical ladder attached to the front, leading up to the open platform. The roof is made of corrugated material, slanted to one side for rain runoff, and supported by four posts at the corners. The platform is open on two sides, providing visibility and shelter for a single person. The base of the tower is set on a square patch of green ground, suggesting placement in a park or open urban area.
description: A small wooden lookout tower with a slanted corrugated roof, elevated on four legs and accessed by a ladder.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slanted roof, enclosed platform, and ladder leading up to the tower.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the ladder, open platform with cut-out sections, and the corrugated roof edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the slanted roof and solid wooden wall of the platform visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back wall of the platform, ladder, and the full width of the corrugated roof.
